role.description: Role this tenant plays in the OpenID Federation topology.

mode.description: Trust decision strategy when both LoTE trust lists and OpenID Federation are configured.

entityId.description: Entity identifier of this issuer/verifier in the federation.

enforceSigningPolicy.description: Whether federation checks are enforced for upstream metadata and signer trust decisions.

cacheTtlSeconds.description: Cache TTL in seconds for federation entity statements and trust chain results.
